scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd packages/api dev" "bun run --cwd packages/web dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/api build && bun run --cwd packages/web build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/api test && bun run --cwd packages/web test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/api lint && bun run --cwd packages/web lint
